summary: programs fit and triage weekend propagate listResourceObjects errors instead of discarding them with _.
reason: When the local SQLite store is unavailable, schema-incompatible after a store upgrade, or not yet synced, both commands silently rendered empty output instead of surfacing the underlying error. Matches the error-handling idiom already used by hacktivity learn/trends and programs scope-drift. Greptile P1 on PR #459.
